channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Banchou Tactics: Lion Heart announced for PS5, Xbox Series, and Switch 2
item.content:encoded:
Corecell Technology, in cooperation with ITSARAAMATA, has announced Banchou Tactics: Lion Heart, an “action tactical RPG set in the fierce world of rival Japanese delinquent schools.” It will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and Switch 2 in Q3 2026.

Here is an overview of the game, via Corecell Technology:

ITSARAAMATA x Corecell Technology presents Banchou Tactics: Lion Heart, an indie action tactical RPG set in the fierce world of rival Japanese delinquent schools.

The game blends tactical decision-making with dynamic action-timing combat. Players must plan their moves, position their allies, and master the timing of punches, kicks, guards, counters, and special attacks to win each battle.

Players follow Kusumi Kyoshiro as he fights alongside memorable allies, challenges rival schools, and rises through the ranks in a story of friendship, pride, and the drive to become the strongest. Along the way, he will encounter colorful heroines and unexpected story moments that add charm to the school rivalry drama.

With its Japanese school rivalry setting, active combat timing, and nostalgia-friendly tactical battles, Banchou Tactics: Lion Heart delivers a fresh indie action tactical RPG experience for players who enjoy strategy with a hard-hitting action twist.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/banchou-tactics-lion-heart-announced-for-ps5-xbox-series-and-switch-2
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Tekken! Cartoon shorts series announced
item.content:encoded:
• Anime

A series of short cartoons featuring popular Tekken characters.

Bandai Namco has announced Tekken! Cartoon, a series of short cartoons featuring popular characters from the Tekken series.

The teaser text reads: “Will this fight end in a draw? Your favorite Tekken characters are coming out of the ring and into the cartoon world! Keep an eye on our socials for more news about the Tekken! Cartoon.”

The staff includes:

  • Character Designer and Animator: Amehiro
  • Music and Sound Designer: in the blue shirt
  • Cast: Tsubasa Tobinaga
  • Brand Supervisor: Tekken Project
  • Planner: Masateru Miyamoto
  • Creative Director / Planner: Syohei Hashimoto
  • Creative Director / Planner: Hironori Hasegawa
  • Business Producer: Mihoko Nakashima
  • Director: Sohta Ozawa (NERD)
  • Director of Photography: Yuta Kakei
  • 1st Assistant Camera: Yuki Urakami
  • 2nd Assistant Camera: Shingo Naramura
  • Lighting Director: Kazuya Imose
  • Lighting Assistant: Ko Sato / Shota Yamanaka
  • Production Designer: Shiho Onuma
  • Art Assistant: Tomohiro Hirota
  • Digital Imaging Technician: Seiji Uchida
  • Hair and Make-up: Hanako Kaiya
  • Stylist: Minoru Sugahara
  • Offline Editor: Asuka Mochizuki
  • Colorist: Elder Zulpukarov (TREE Digital Studio)
  • Online Editor: Ryunosuke Hayashi
  • Sound Mixer: Ken Takahashi
  • Character Designer and Animator: Amehiro
  • Music and Sound Designer: in the blue shirt
  • Designer: Shimpei Umeda
  • Casting: Nozomi Yabuki (FORMEN)
  • Assistant Director: Sora Kanesaki
  • Production Manager: Numanao
  • Production Assistant: Ryoma Saito / Rio Toyoshima
  • Business Producer: Asumi Nishiki (NERD)
  • Producer: Minami Komatsu (NERD)

Watch the teaser trailer below.

Tekken! Cartoon Teaser Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/tekken-cartoon-shorts-series-announced

item.title: Easy Delivery Co. ‘EasyCo EasyRally’ update launches July 6
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Smartphone
  • Switch
  • Xbox Series

An alternate, re-imagined version of the game.

Publisher Oro Interactive and developer Sam C will release a free update for Easy Delivery Co. on July 6, which adds the “EasyCo EasyRally” game mode—an alternate, re-imagined version of the game featuring new music by Sohaoying.

Easy Delivery Co. is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch, PC via Steam, iOS via App Store, and Android via Google Play.

Watch a new trailer below.

“EasyCo EasyRally” Update Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/easy-delivery-co-easyco-easyrally-update-launches-july-6
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
